descricao: Reads foreign student data from Google Sheets, fills a declaration template in Google Docs with student and course data, converts it to PDF and uploads it to Google Drive.
problema: Enrollment declarations for foreign students were filled out manually one by one, causing delays and errors in data like dates, passports and amounts.
resultado: Documents generated automatically every 30 minutes, with no filling errors.
metrica: Automatic PDF document generation every 30 minutes
destaques: Organized by student folder in Drive
